title: The Coming Great Transition v 2.0

title: The Last Generation of Majority Humans
preview_text:
We are the last generation where humans are the majority labor species on Earth. Not in 200 years. Not in 50. Within one working lifetime.
I know how that sounds. But the numbers aren't science
